bead.title: Provider introspection adapters: read /props at construction and merge into ProtocolCapabilities
bead.description:
P1 refinement on top of the dialect-fix bead fizeau-073fe18b.
Introspection adapters read provider /props at construction time and
override the static ThinkingFormat default with what the live server
actually claims.

Per ADR-010 Amendment 2026-05-11 the L1 layer (live introspection) is the
authoritative source where available; this bead implements L1 for ds4 and
llama-server. The static defaults that fizeau-073fe18b sets become the L3
floor; L2 (catalog reasoning_wire) sits in between.

After this bead lands, fizeau auto-detects:
- ds4's alias map → effective reasoning_levels without catalog curation
- llama-server's chat_template variant → auto-detect kwargs vs top-level
  envelope (today's wire choice is hardcoded by fizeau-073fe18b)
- server-side reasoning_format default → can override per-request only
  when needed

Cost model (measured 2026-05-11):
  ds4 /props on LAN:         p50=13ms  max=51ms  (n=10)
  sindri /props on LAN:      p50=9ms   max=13ms  (n=10)
  OR /api/v1/models cloud:   p50=316ms max=325ms (n=5)

Three adapters in this bead:

1. **ds4 adapter** (internal/provider/ds4/introspection.go, new):
   GET http://<base>/props. Parse reasoning.{supported_efforts, aliases,
   default, effective_default, think_max_min_context},
   api.supported_request_parameters, sampling, runtime. Derive effective
   ThinkingFormat=OpenAIEffort and effective reasoning_levels from
   supported_efforts minus aliased duplicates.

2. **llama-server adapter** (internal/provider/llamaserver/introspection.go,
   new): GET http://<base>/props. Parse
   default_generation_settings.params.reasoning_format, chat_template
   (substring match for `enable_thinking` to detect kwargs envelope),
   chat_template_caps.supports_preserve_reasoning, build_info.

3. **Common plumbing** (internal/provider/registry/introspection.go, new):
   ProviderIntrospection struct, registry of adapters by provider type,
   cache by (base_url, model), non-fatal failure with structured warning.

Construction order: instantiate provider → run introspection adapter (if
registered) → merge into capabilities → ready. Per-request path is
unchanged; no introspection IO at request time.

In-scope files:
- internal/provider/ds4/introspection.go (new)
- internal/provider/ds4/introspection_test.go (new)
- internal/provider/llamaserver/introspection.go (new)
- internal/provider/llamaserver/introspection_test.go (new)
- internal/provider/registry/introspection.go (new)
- internal/provider/registry/registry.go (wire adapter invocation)
- internal/provider/ds4/ds4.go (consume introspection)
- internal/provider/llamaserver/llamaserver.go (consume introspection)
- internal/provider/ds4/testdata/props/ (recorded fixtures)
- internal/provider/llamaserver/testdata/props/ (recorded fixtures)

Out-of-scope (separate beads):
- OR adapter (introspection thin; catalog L2 covers it).
- Anthropic-native / OpenAI-native adapters.
- vLLM adapter (defer until lane re-added).

Depends on: fizeau-073fe18b (wire-format dialect fixes — adapters set
the EFFECTIVE ThinkingFormat to the new variants).
bead.acceptance:
1. `go test ./internal/provider/ds4/...` passes including a new test
   that parses a recorded /props fixture and asserts:
   - EffectiveReasoningLevels == [\"high\", \"max\"]
   - AliasMap reflects {low→high, medium→high, xhigh→high}
   - ThinkingFormat == OpenAIEffort
   - SupportedRequestParams contains \"reasoning_effort\"
2. `go test ./internal/provider/llamaserver/...` passes including a new
   test that parses a recorded /props fixture and asserts:
   - ThinkingFormat == Qwen (with chat_template_kwargs envelope after
     fizeau-073fe18b)
   - ServerSideReasoningFormat reflects the value in the fixture
3. `go test ./internal/provider/registry/...` passes including:
   - Adapter failure does not fail provider construction.
   - Cache hit: two providers at the same (base_url, model) trigger
     exactly one introspection call.
4. `go vet ./...` passes.
5. Manual smoke: operator script constructs ds4 + llama-server providers
   against live endpoints and prints the effective capabilities. Output
   includes the alias map, supported params, server-side reasoning_format.

governing.title: ADR-010: Reasoning Wire Form Belongs in the Model Catalog
